title: aristolochia triloba
intro: Aristolochia triloba, also known as the triple-leaf aristolochia or Chinese snake root, is a flowering plant species in the Aristolochiaceae family. Traditionally, Aristolochia triloba has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits associated with Aristolochia triloba include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites. In herbal preparations, Aristolochia triloba is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, but its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
